scripts.dev:api: node scripts/run_with_env.mjs BJC_API_PORT=3001 -- tsx watch src/server.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm --prefix web run test && npm --prefix web-user run test
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm --prefix web run build:bjc && npm --prefix web-user run build:bjc
scripts.prepare:e2e: npm run build && node scripts/run_with_env.mjs BJC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3011 VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3011 -- npm --prefix web run build && node scripts/run_with_env.mjs BJC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3011 VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3011 -- npm --prefix web-user run build
scripts.e2e: npm run prepare:e2e && node scripts/run_with_env.mjs BJC_E2E_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3011 BJC_E2E_ADMIN_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4191 BJC_E2E_USER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4192 -- npm run preflight:e2e && node scripts/run_with_env.mjs BJC_E2E_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3011 BJC_E2E_ADMIN_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4191 BJC_E2E_USER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4192 -- playwright test -c e2e/playwright.config.ts
scripts.e2e:headed: npm run prepare:e2e && node scripts/run_with_env.mjs BJC_E2E_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3011 BJC_E2E_ADMIN_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4191 BJC_E2E_USER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4192 -- npm run preflight:e2e && node scripts/run_with_env.mjs BJC_E2E_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3011 BJC_E2E_ADMIN_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4191 BJC_E2E_USER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4192 -- playwright test -c e2e/playwright.config.ts --headed
scripts.smoke:all: npm run preflight:smoke && npm run smoke:member && npm run smoke:staking && npm run smoke:reward && npm run smoke:withdrawal && npm run smoke:direct-referral && npm run smoke:rank-qualification && npm run smoke:rank-bonus && npm run smoke:contribution && npm run smoke:sidecar
